items.title: Sam Altman responds to ‘incendiary’ New Yorker article after attack on his home
items.summary: OpenAI CEO Sam Altman addressed a controversial New Yorker article and a recent attack on his home, highlighting the intense scrutiny and personal risks associated with leading the frontier of AI development.

items.title: Salesforce rolls out new Slackbot AI agent as it battles Microsoft and Google in workplace AI
items.summary: Salesforce has launched an enhanced Slackbot AI agent, intensifying its competition with Microsoft and Google in the rapidly evolving market for AI-powered workplace productivity tools.

items.title: Google Vids: Create, edit and share videos at no cost with new AI features
items.summary: Google introduces new AI-powered features for Google Vids, allowing users to create, edit, and share videos at no cost, further integrating generative AI into its Workspace suite.

items.title: OpenVLThinkerV2: A Generalist Multimodal Reasoning Model for Multi-domain Visual Tasks
items.summary: Researchers introduce OpenVLThinkerV2, a new generalist multimodal reasoning model designed to excel across a wide array of visual tasks by integrating diverse reasoning capabilities.

items.title: LPM 1.0: Video-based Character Performance Model
items.summary: LPM 1.0 presents a novel video-based character performance model, enabling realistic and dynamic animation of digital characters directly from video input.

items.title: DMax: Aggressive Parallel Decoding for dLLMs
items.summary: A new paper introduces DMax, an aggressive parallel decoding method aimed at significantly improving the inference speed and efficiency of distributed Large Language Models (dLLMs).

items.title: KnowU-Bench: Towards Interactive, Proactive, and Personalized Mobile Agent Evaluation
items.summary: KnowU-Bench proposes a new benchmark for evaluating mobile AI agents, focusing on interactive, proactive, and personalized behaviors in real-world scenarios.

items.title: Externalization in LLM Agents: A Unified Review of Memory, Skills, Protocols and Harness Engineering
items.summary: This paper offers a comprehensive review of externalization techniques in LLM agents, covering memory, skills, protocols, and harness engineering to enhance their capabilities and robustness.

items.title: Act Wisely: Cultivating Meta-Cognitive Tool Use in Agentic Multimodal Models
items.summary: Researchers explore methods to cultivate meta-cognitive tool use in agentic multimodal models, enabling them to 'act wisely' by strategically selecting and applying tools for complex tasks.

items.title: MolmoWeb: Open Visual Web Agent and Open Data for the Open Web
items.summary: MolmoWeb introduces an open visual web agent and corresponding open datasets, aiming to democratize research and development for AI agents interacting with the web.

items.title: OpenSpatial: A Principled Data Engine for Empowering Spatial Intelligence
items.summary: OpenSpatial presents a principled data engine designed to empower spatial intelligence in AI systems by providing structured and efficient access to spatial data.

items.title: I got mass-flagged by GPTZero for my own writing. So I built an open-source alternative in pure Python.
items.summary: A developer created an open-source AI content detection tool in Python after experiencing false positives from GPTZero on their own original writing, highlighting the challenges of AI authorship verification.

items.title: Agent Reading Test: A New Benchmark for AI Agent Comprehension
items.summary: The Agent Reading Test introduces a novel benchmark designed to rigorously evaluate the reading comprehension and understanding capabilities of AI agents.

items.title: Small Vision-Language Models are Smart Compressors for Long Video Understanding
items.summary: This research demonstrates that small vision-language models can act as efficient compressors, significantly improving the processing and understanding of long video sequences.

items.title: Flux Attention: Context-Aware Hybrid Attention for Efficient LLMs Inference
items.summary: Flux Attention proposes a new context-aware hybrid attention mechanism to achieve more efficient inference for Large Language Models, optimizing performance without sacrificing accuracy.
